title: Employee Assistance Program (EAP) Guide
description: Complete guide to our confidential EAP services including counseling, legal consultation, and financial planning support.

title: Desk Stretching Routine
description: A printable 10-minute stretching routine you can do at your desk. Targets neck, shoulders, wrists, and lower back.

title: Mental Health First Aid Resources
description: Information on recognizing signs of mental health challenges and how to support colleagues. Includes crisis hotline numbers.

title: Benefits Summary — Wellness Perks
description: Overview of all wellness-related benefits: gym reimbursement, wellness days, health screenings, and more.
